Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: River Monsters - The Mutilator
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaskan Horror
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes into the forbidding Alaskan wilderness to visit two large lakes.

programme.title: River Monsters - Rift Valley Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is on a quest to Africa's Great Rift Valley.

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters - Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in the Australian outback trying to catch the rare freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Brazil in search of a fish that has already killed three cowboys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Piranha
programme.desc: Are the stories of piranha attacks on humans just myth and imagination?

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates whether the snakehead deserves its fearsome reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates tales of a mysterious shark-octopus hybrid called the Lusca.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Parana River in Argentina.

programme.title: River Monsters - European Maneater
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates tales of a man-eating catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - Bone Crusher
programme.desc: In the remote Amazon, Jeremy Wade seeks a predator which cannot be caught with a rod.

programme.title: River Monsters - Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the ferocious Goliath Tiger Fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alligator Gar
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas on the trail of the vicious alligator gar.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Assassins
programme.desc: In the depths of the Amazon, legends tell of an evil spirit in a great fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: Drink with God Season 2 - Drink with God Season 2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: From menbosha to dongpo pork, the undisputed master of Chinese cuisine who has won over countless taste buds?Chef Lee Yeon-bok joins the show. What innovative and delicious delivery dishes would he recommend to enjoy with his close friends?

programme.title: Seasonal Sister season 2 - Seasonal Sister season 2 Ep.9
programme.desc: The Busan branch of the Seasonal Tavern opens! Singers Eun Ga-eun and Kim Soo-chan bring explosive excitement from the moment they arrive.

programme.title: The Korean Dish Expedition - The Korean Dish Expedition Ep.9
programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. Some flavors have faded, others nearly forgotten?but at the refined yet simple tables set by the family matriarchs, viewers experience a moving journey back in time.

programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 2
programme.desc: After meeting a guest, Dong-il and Chang-seop travel to Jeju Island to visit a distillery that produces Gosorisul using traditional methods. After tasting Jeju’s traditional cheongju and soju, the group decides to enjoy fresh local seafood from the island.

programme.title: Chingus - Chingus ep.18 Quiz Battle for Supper
programme.desc: Let the tasty adventure begin! From culture shock to culinary delight?this is their fun-filled journey into the heart of K-food.

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 1. “Guksu-bibim”
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Guksu-bibim” which was described as a simple dish enjoyed in daily life on the book 「Puinpilji」, written in Joseon Dynasty.

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 2. “Sengbogeo-eumjeok”and "Semyeon"
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Sengbogeo-eumjeok” (Pan-Fried Abalone Skewers) and "Semyeon" (Mung Bean Noodles in Omija Honey Water).

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 3. “Jang Jjanji”and "Jeonbok Chimchae"
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Jang Jjanji” (Pickled Cucumber) and "Jeonbok Chimchae" (Stuffed Abalone in Salty Water).

programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While negotiating peace between two brothers contesting the throne of Thebes, an amnesiac Hercules is seduced by the evil Queen Omphale.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Mimi's family fell apart. One day, Mimi finds Chomel, a cat and brings it home, only for it to cause a series of events that brings her broken family back together again.

programme.title: My Future Husband
programme.desc: Emily berharap untuk menemui bakal suami dan pada suatu hari muncul seorang lelaki bernama Atta yang mengaku dia adalah suami Emily dari masa hadapan.

programme.title: Perangkap Perkahwinan
programme.desc: Three best friends promised to get married, at the same time when they turn 26 years old. Their perceptions of marriage life begin to change and conflict ensues.

programme.title: Cik Puan Sinderella
programme.desc: This is a lighthearted family drama about a teenage girl who is closely guarded by her mother.

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Anak Kerak
programme.desc: Husin telah menggunakan ilmu hitam iaitu dengan ‘Anak Kerak' demi untuk mendapatkan kekebalan, kesenangan dan kemewahan hidup di dunia

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Buta
programme.desc: Telefilem komedi romantik tentang perkenalan singkat di antara Zulin, seorang gadis yang tidak pernah bercinta, dengan Izlan, seorang duda dalam satu 'blind date' yang diaturkan oleh Nadya Ramanshah.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost
programme.desc: Iman dipaksa berkahwin dengan Qaseh, anak kepada orang gajinya untuk mewarisi harta bapanya. Percutian mereka di Bosnia membuahkan bibit-bibit cinta. Lakonan Iqram Dinzly, Zarina Zainoordin dan Yana Shamsudin.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta
programme.desc: Telemovie sekuel Jula Juli Bintang Cinta kini kembali! Kali ini, Jula dan Juli mengalami konflik percintaan dengan Dani & Izham sehingga mereka memutuskan untuk berpisah dan melarikan diri ke kampung Juli.

programme.title: Kampung Kuala Lambat
programme.desc: Kampung Kuala Lambat bagai mengalami sumpahan apabila lelaki yang berkahwin muda akan mati di hari pernikahan mereka namun kejadian ganjil ini tidak berlaku kepada lelaki yang berusia 60 tahun ke atas.

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: After marrying Zain, Sara lived in the same house with Pak Dolah, her father-in-law. Because of the family's grudge, Sara started making trouble by seducing her own father-in-law.

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang ejen yang bekerja di sebuah syarikat penghancur jodoh yang ditugaskan untuk memikat seorang wanita supaya dapat melupakan suaminya yang telah diisytiharkan meninggal dunia. Namun dia jatuh cinta pada wanita tersebut

programme.title: Cerai
programme.desc: Pengalaman berkurung dengan pasangan selama musim PKP memaksa dua pasangan suami isteri menilai semula perkahwinan mereka yang telah disalah ertikan selama ini.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 299

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 244

programme.title: Forty Years Without Seeing the Beloved's Dream - EP 2 梦断香消四十年
programme.desc: The Cantonese opera Forty Years Without Seeing the Beloved's Dream was written by Chen Guanqing. The Southern Song Dynasty patriotic poet Lu You fell in love and married his cousin Tang Wan, who had lost both her parents at a young age. During this period, the Jin invaders left the Song Dynasty in a state of partial seclusion. Lu You aspired to restore the country, but the ascendancy of the peace faction led to his repeated demotions.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 318

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE Bio-Ray Plantar Fasciitis Compression Foot Sleeves
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity. 支撑足弓，稳固筋膜，有效缓解疼痛和肿胀。袜子轻轻包覆脚部肌肉和筋腱，加上日本生化能技术，促进血气循环，让脚更舒适、更快恢复。防滑、柔软透气，全天穿都舒服，不管是运动还是穿袜子都合适！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Clynn by Nature Hair Regrowth Bundle
programme.desc: A simple, plant based organic three-step system designed to naturally restore scalp health, block DHT, and revive dormant roots for noticeably thicker, fuller hair. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Comvita Honey

Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. Comvita™ 10+ 麦卢卡蜂蜜是来自新西兰的优质蜂蜜，因其抗菌特性而闻名。它有助于增强免疫力，缓解喉咙痛，并促进消化。胶原蛋白肽麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品有助于皮肤、关节和骨骼健康，同时改善皮肤水分和弹性。刺梨朝鲜蓟麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品是全球首款设计用于保护肝脏的蜂蜜，结合了麦卢卡蜂蜜的益处和修复特性，支持整体健康和帮助睡眠时排毒。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Dampness & Blood supplement
programme.desc: Kampo Blood Clean Supplement combines traditional herbal wisdom with modern wellness needs. Helps normalize blood pressure, blood sugar, and cholesterol levels. Helps to promote clear, flexible, and elastic blood vessels, reducing stroke risk. Kampo Anti-dampness capsules help remove excess dampness from the body and balance internal energy for optimal health. Helps eliminate edema and reduce water retention. 日本制造。融合传统汉方智慧与现代科技，严选中药及草本植物精华，配方温和纯净，天然无添加。有助于调节血压、血糖和胆固醇水平。有助于促进血管通畅、柔韧有弹性。日本制造，有助于清除体内湿气。平衡内气，促进健康。帮助消除水肿，减少水肿。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Orofill Golden Serum / Health+ Orofill Revive
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages. 采用100%纯正西藏沙棘制成，富含190多种营养成分。外用黄金修复液有助于抚平细纹，缓解皮肤问题，加速伤口愈合；口服焕活软胶囊则有助于抗衰老、溃疡愈合，并滋养黏膜。两者结合使用，由内而外焕活身心，提供免疫力支持和女性更年期舒缓，温和安全，呵护健康，令肌肤焕发青春光彩。

Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. programme.title: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While negotiating peace between two brothers contesting the throne of Thebes, an amnesiac Hercules is seduced by the evil Queen Omphale.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While negotiating peace between two brothers contesting the throne of Thebes, an amnesiac Hercules is seduced by the evil Queen Omphale.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While negotiating peace between two brothers contesting the throne of Thebes, an amnesiac Hercules is seduced by the evil Queen Omphale.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Cyclone
programme.desc: After a surprise cyclone hits the area, tourists become stranded on a boat in the sea, and they have to do anything in order to survive. To make matters even worse, they're joined by the survivors of a plane crash and a sinking boat.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Hingga Jumpa Lagi
programme.desc: Eva is diagnosed with cancer and prays that she could travel back to the past in order to prevent the love between her and her husband so that her husband can lead a happy life. Her prayer is granted…

programme.title: I Heart You Cik Yah
programme.desc: Zulkefli and Badariah are always arguing, but in order to prevent the factory where they work from being closed by Qarina, they must work together. Out of hatred, they start feeling for each other.

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Jihan Nak Displin Anak
programme.desc: Jihan dan suami kalut apabila anak mereka tidak mahu pulang beraya di kampung. Mereka cuba untuk mendisiplinkan anak mereka sebelum hari raya

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.

programme.title: Bibik Aku Nak Kahwin
programme.desc: Milah yang terlalu berharap untuk berkahwin, akhirnya menemui jodoh secara tiba-tiba. Lakonan Didie Alias, Hairul Azreen dan Nabila AF.

programme.title: Baby-Sita
programme.desc: Two grand-theft-auto and best friends Adam & Hatim discovered a baby at the back seat of a stolen car. Keen to avoid detection, they take care of the baby while figuring out how to return the baby without getting caught

programme.title: Baby Jarum
programme.desc: Mami Jarum is back! and this time Mami is making sure her grand-daughter Asyikin will marry the man of her choosing, however Asyikin has a better plan (or worse!) for herself.
